# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please include a summary of the change, related issues, and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
Please check the options that apply:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (no logic changes)
- [ ] ⚙️ Refactoring / Chore (no functional changes)

## Quality Checklist
Before submitting this PR, please verify:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented on my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit/integration tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] TypeScript check (`npm run type-check`) runs with no compiler errors.
- [ ] Lint check (`npm run lint`) runs with no lint warnings/errors.
- [ ] Build (`npm run build`) finishes successfully.

## Verification & Screenshots
Please describe the tests you ran to verify your changes and attach screenshots or terminal logs if applicable.
- **Test A:** ...
- **Test B:** ...
